compiled_state.title: Create figma_merge Python package skeleton
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Create the plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/ package directory with an __init__.py that exports the public interface.

## testing_mode: GREEN
Infrastructure-only — package __init__.py with imports, no conditional logic. Unit test exemption: (1) no conditional logic, (2) any test would be a change-detector, (3) infrastructure-boundary-only module registration.

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/__init__.py

## __init__.py contents
Export the four public functions: merge_spatial, merge_tokens, generate_svg, validate_id_linkage (imported from their submodules once those exist). Initially can be empty or have placeholder imports with NotImplementedError.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/__init__.py exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/__init__.py
- [ ] python3 -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0,"plugins/dso/scripts"); import figma_merge' exits 0
  Verify: python3 -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0,"plugins/dso/scripts"); import figma_merge'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
